prompt: {"type":"black-and-white comic page","style":"clean manga-inspired grayscale line art with soft screentone shading, simple modern interior backgrounds, readable comic lettering, humorous tech satire","page":{"count":1,"label":"Page 1","panel_count":4,"reading_order":"top to bottom"},"characters":[{"id":"character_a","description":"young man with short straight dark hair, plain long-sleeve crewneck shirt, skeptical expression"},{"id":"character_b","description":"young man with messy wavy light hair, plain dark long-sleeve crewneck shirt, energetic and absurdly confident expression"}],"layout":{"sections":[{"title":"Panel 1","position":"top full width","count":2,"labels":["Then we have to search everywhere.","We need more GPUs."],"scene":"both characters sitting at a table with an open laptop between them, character_a touching his chin while thinking, character_b leaning forward with hands clasped, bookshelf with books and a small rabbit figurine on the left, tall potted plant on the right"},{"title":"Panel 2","position":"second full width","count":2,"labels":["No GPUs.","Check stranger places."],"scene":"the two characters crouch and search with small flashlights, character_a looking under a table, character_b opening a desk drawer and inspecting inside"},{"title":"Panel 3","position":"third full width","count":2,"labels":["That is not how computers work.","Sometimes innovation is hidden in cold storage."],"scene":"open refrigerator centered in the background with visible shelves and door compartments holding milk, bowls, vegetables, bottles, and containers; character_a stands left with arms crossed, character_b stands right with one hand at his chin, peering into the fridge"},{"title":"Panel 4","position":"bottom full width","count":3,"labels":["Closest hit so far.","CRUNCHY BITS","plink"],"scene":"kitchen setting, character_a stands left with arms crossed delivering the deadpan line, character_b on the right pours cereal from a large box labeled CRUNCHY BITS into a bowl, a single screw falls into the bowl with the sound effect plink, spoon on the table"}],"borders":"thick rectangular comic gutters and borders"},"text":{"language":"English","speech_bubbles":"rounded comic balloons with bold hand-lettered style"},"composition":"vertical comic page, four stacked horizontal panels, medium shots with clear storytelling and consistent character design across panels","theme":"absurd search for GPUs treated like lost household objects"}
translatedPrompt: {"type":"黑白漫画页","style":"简洁的日漫风格灰度线稿，带有柔和的网点阴影，简单的现代室内背景，易读的漫画字体，幽默的科技讽刺","page":{"count":1,"label":"第 1 页","panel_count":4,"reading_order":"从上到下"},"characters":[{"id":"character_a","description":"留着短直黑发的年轻男子，穿着素色长袖圆领衫，表情怀疑"},{"id":"character_b","description":"留着凌乱卷曲浅色头发的年轻男子，穿着深色素色长袖圆领衫，表情充满活力且荒诞自信"}],"layout":{"sections":[{"title":"第 1 格","position":"顶部全宽","count":2,"labels":["接下来我们得搜遍每一个角落。","我们需要更多的 GPU。"],"scene":"两个角色坐在桌边，中间放着一台打开的笔记本电脑，character_a 摸着下巴思考，character_b 双手合十向前倾，左侧书架上有书和一个小兔子摆件，右侧有一盆高大的盆栽"},{"title":"第 2 格","position":"第二行全宽","count":2,"labels":["没有 GPU。","去更奇怪的地方找找。"],"scene":"两个角色蹲着，拿着小手电筒搜寻，character_a 正在桌子底下看，character_b 正在打开书桌抽屉并往里检查"},{"title":"第 3 格","position":"第三行全宽","count":2,"labels":["电脑可不是这么运作的。","有时创新就藏在冷藏室里。"],"scene":"背景中央是一个打开的冰箱，可以看到架子和门上的隔层里放着牛奶、碗、蔬菜、瓶子和容器；character_a 站在左侧双臂交叉，character_b 站在右侧，单手托着下巴，正往冰箱里窥视"},{"title":"第 4 格","position":"底部全宽","count":3,"labels":["目前最接近的一次了。","CRUNCHY BITS","叮当"],"scene":"厨房场景，character_a 站在左侧双臂交叉，面无表情地说着台词，右侧的 character_b 正将一盒标有 CRUNCHY BITS 的大盒麦片倒入碗中，一颗螺丝掉进碗里发出“叮当”的声效，桌上放着一把勺子"}],"borders":"粗矩形漫画分镜格和边框"},"text":{"language":"中文","speech_bubbles":"圆角漫画气泡，带有粗体手写风格"},"composition":"竖版漫画页，四个堆叠的横向分镜，中景镜头，叙事清晰，各分镜间角色设计保持一致","theme":"将荒诞的 GPU 搜寻过程视为寻找丢失的家居用品"}

breakdown.creativeCore: 有趣的 GPU 搜索漫画页面：这是一页灰度四格漫画，讲述了两名年轻人荒诞地在家中搜寻 GPU 的故事，适用于幽默科技漫画、分镜演示或保持角色一致性的连载漫画。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.text: 要求可读；包含标注/说明
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定
